lines.speaker: Meredith
lines.text: Welcome to the Games Zone!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I play board games?

lines.speaker: Meredith
lines.text: You can challenge someone to a game anywhere in the Games Zone (except on a PvP or Deadman world) by using the right click option.

lines.speaker: Meredith
lines.text: Choose the type of game and then choose the options you want such as time per move.

lines.speaker: Meredith
lines.text: If your opponent accepts the challenge you will be taken to one of the tables around where you will play your game of choice.

lines.speaker: Meredith
lines.text: Once you have finished your game you will come back here where you can challenge again! We also have tables in a few pubs around the world!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What games can I play?

lines.speaker: Meredith
lines.text: Currently we offer Draughts, Runelink, Runesquares, and Runeversi.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Draughts?

lines.speaker: Meredith
lines.text: Draughts uses standard rules, apart from: a draw is declared if no piece has been taken or promoted for forty moves.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Runelink?

lines.speaker: Meredith
lines.text: Yup, you have to get four runes in row.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Runesquares?

lines.speaker: Meredith
lines.text: Yes, you take it in turns to add a line with the goal of making squares. Everytime you make a square you take another turn.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Runeversi?

lines.speaker: Meredith
lines.text: Yep, the aim is to have more of your runes on the board than your opponent. You can take your opponents pieces by trapping them between your own.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I buy a drink please?

lines.speaker: Meredith
lines.text: I'm afraid I don't sell drinks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

sections.title: On seasonal or permanent Deadman Mode worlds

lines.speaker: Meredith
lines.text: Welcome to the Games Zone!

lines.speaker: Meredith
lines.text: Unfortunately we do not offer board game playing on this world. Try logging onto a non-PvP or Deadman world!
